topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, AI Network
topics_to_register.description: Learning path covering Bitcoin, Ethereum, and AI Network whitepapers and architectures

topics_to_register.title: Birth of Bitcoin
topics_to_register.description: Learn the background of Satoshi Nakamoto's Bitcoin proposal during the 2008 financial crisis and the problems with trust-based financial systems.

topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin Transaction Structure
topics_to_register.description: Learn how electronic coins are defined as chains of digital signatures and how the double-spending problem is solved.

topics_to_register.title: Proof of Work (PoW)
topics_to_register.description: Learn the PoW system inspired by Adam Back's Hashcash and the 'one-CPU-one-vote' principle.

topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin Incentive Structure
topics_to_register.description: Learn Bitcoin's incentive mechanism consisting of block rewards and transaction fees, and the Halving schedule.

topics_to_register.title: SPV and Merkle Tree
topics_to_register.description: Learn Simplified Payment Verification and disk space reclamation through Merkle Trees.

topics_to_register.title: Bitcoin as State Transition System
topics_to_register.description: Learn the perspective of understanding Bitcoin as a UTXO-based state transition system.

topics_to_register.title: Limitations of Bitcoin Script
topics_to_register.description: Learn the 4 major limitations of Bitcoin Script and the motivation for Ethereum's creation.

topics_to_register.title: Ethereum Account Structure
topics_to_register.description: Learn Ethereum's EOA and contract accounts, and the 4-field structure.

topics_to_register.title: Gas and Fee Model
topics_to_register.description: Learn Ethereum's Gas mechanism and fee structure changes after EIP-1559.

topics_to_register.title: EVM and Code Execution
topics_to_register.description: Learn the Ethereum Virtual Machine's 3 storage spaces and the Solidity language.

topics_to_register.title: The Merge and PoS Transition
topics_to_register.description: Learn about Ethereum's transition from PoW to PoS (The Merge) in September 2022.

topics_to_register.title: Ethereum Application Areas
topics_to_register.description: Learn application areas proposed in the Ethereum whitepaper: token systems, financial derivatives, DAOs.

topics_to_register.title: Ethereum Scalability Challenges
topics_to_register.description: Learn the scalability problem where all transactions must be processed by all nodes, and Layer 2 solutions.

topics_to_register.title: AI Network Vision
topics_to_register.description: Learn AI Network's vision — global computer network and the Open Resource initiative.

topics_to_register.title: Deep Computing Architecture
topics_to_register.description: Learn AI Network's Deep Computing — the 3 components: SRE, Big Storage, AIN Blockchain Protocol.

topics_to_register.title: AI Network Role System
topics_to_register.description: Learn the 4 roles: Admin, Evaluator, Worker, Client, and the Reputation Tree (RTree).

topics_to_register.title: AI Network Execution Model
topics_to_register.description: Learn the event-driven off-chain execution model and the Post-Consensus protocol.

topics_to_register.title: AIN Token Economics
topics_to_register.description: Learn the utility of the AIN token and Preemptive Buying options.

topics_to_register.title: AI Network ML Patterns
topics_to_register.description: Learn distributed computing, loss function optimization, data parallelism, and reinforcement learning patterns.

topics_to_register.title: Open Source to Open Resource
topics_to_register.description: Learn the core concept of AI Network transforming open source AI into sovereign agents (Open Resource).
